content.text:
Here are the ways you can get help with Claude Code:

## Built-in Help
- **`/help`** - Get help with using Claude Code directly in the interface

## Feedback & Issues
- **Report issues**: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues

## What I Can Help With
I'm designed to assist with software engineering tasks including:

- **Reading & editing code** - I can analyze, modify, and create files
- **Project exploration** - Search, navigate, and understand codebases  
- **Implementation tasks** - Build features, fix bugs, refactor code
- **Testing & debugging** - Write tests, diagnose issues, optimize performance
- **Design & planning** - Create UI components, plan architecture, review code

## Available Tools
I have access to specialized tools for:
- File operations (Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep)
- Code execution (Bash, notebook editing)
- Project management (todos, plans, git operations)
- Web development (design systems, UI components)
- And many more through the MCP server ecosystem

## Getting Started
Just describe what you want to work on! I can help with everything from simple file edits to complex multi-component implementations. I'll automatically select the right tools and approaches for your specific needs.

What would you like to work on?
